name: cave-drow-outpost
summary: A drow forward post carved with unsettling spider-silk geometry — black stone, faerzress-glow sconces, a command slab at the far wall.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: asymmetric — one long axis biased to the command wall

accent.purpose: etched sigil slab or silk-web floor

primary_palette.note: officer's briefing stone — maps etched in chalk
hand crossbows and poisoned blades on display
obsidian basin for the matron's eyes

story_prompts: a scouting cell debriefs after a surface raid — prisoners in the back
ritual in progress — matron priestess communing with Lolth
outpost abandoned hastily, web-shrouds over unfinished work
war room: the officer plots an ambush on a drider patrol

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: near-dark (0.05-0.1) with cold purple faerzress accents

anti_patterns: no warm lighting — drow never sit in firelight
don't arrange props symmetrically — drow aesthetic is deliberate asymmetry
webs and silk should cling to corners and ceilings, not fill the floor
